text.message: nah its fine blue is all ore
i offered before i rolled a 7
was gonna play a knight and do it
Well at least your brain works
and according to u im not dealing with u anyways
were gonna beat each other here if u dont start getting at blue
Why are you going back on what we agreed upon?
i didnt agree on anything i made black an offer and u got a little salty im ready to play the game when u are
You agreed with me saying we’re not dealing
im happy to deal with u whenever boss
When you had leverage you were fine not dealing
Now you need a deal and are “happy to deal”
look i dont really know what ur getting at here but i dont think anything im gonna say in chat will change ur mind so if we wanna let blue win keep it up
Don’t give me any nasty attitude next time either
so red will be in decent shape
